scripts.dev: concurrently "npm run dev --prefix server" "npm run dev --prefix client"
scripts.setup: npm install && npm install --prefix server && npm install --prefix client
scripts.build: npm install --include=dev --prefix server && npm install --include=dev --prefix client && npm run prisma:generate --prefix server && npm run build --prefix client
scripts.db:setup: npm run db:push --prefix server && npm run db:seed --prefix server
